'''Sarlacc Battalion A''', named after the [[Sarlacc/Legends|Sarlacc]] of [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]], was a [[Battalion/Legends|battalion]] made up of 576 [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] out of [[Clone Commander/Legends|Clone commander]] [[Gree (clone trooper)/Legends|Gree's]] [[41st Stormtrooper Legion|41st Elite Corps]]. [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Vaas Ga]] was in command of this battalion.

==Appearances==
*''[[Republic Commando: Triple Zero]]'' {{1st}}
